summary: E-commerce project with shopping cart functionality and pending Stripe payment integration
architectural_notes: Shopping cart with quantity adjustment functionality
Payment processing via Stripe API integration
known_issues: Stripe integration requires additional setup configuration

existing_features.title: Add Stripe payment processing integration to replace the current payment methods (Cash on Delivery and UPI). The payment flow should automatically confirm orders upon successful payment.
Update the PaymentPage.tsx to include Stripe as a payment method option alongside or replacing existing payment methods.

new_feature_requests.summary: Integrate Stripe payment processing with automatic payment confirmation
Implement backend logic to handle Stripe payment webhooks and automatically confirm orders when payment is successful.
